de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor

Class ProgramReplaceVisitor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTWalker
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.JavaASTVisitor
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.CreatingASTVisitor
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.ProgramReplaceVisitor
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor

    public class ProgramReplaceVisitor
extends CreatingASTVisitor
    Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order. This walker is used to transform a program according to the given SVInstantiations.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.java.visitor.CreatingASTVisitor
